content.full_text:
October 29, 2008

Jolie Houston
City Attorney, City of Los Altos
Berliner Cohen
10 Almaden Blvd. 11th Fl.
San Jose, California 95113-2233

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-08-155

Dear Ms. Houston:

This letter confirms that you have withdrawn the request for advice on behalf of Councilmember Ronald D. Packard.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Valentina Joyce
Counsel, Legal Division

VJ:jgl
